access.label: Εύκολη πρόσβαση με ασφαλτόδρομο
access.notes: Η επίσημη τουριστική σελίδα της Αστυπάλαιας αναφέρει εύκολη πρόσβαση από τον ασφαλτόδρομο μετά το Λιβάδι και την πρώτη αριστερή στροφή προς την παραλία.

waterDepth.label: Βαθιά νερά
waterDepth.notes: Η επίσημη τουριστική σελίδα της Αστυπάλαιας καταγράφει το νερό ως βαθύ. Δεν αποτελεί live safety ή sea-state claim.

sourceNotes: OSM source pass 2026-05-27: same-name natural=beach feature near stored coordinates supports identity/location only. Confidence, access, services, amenities, and scoring were not changed.

Next popular-area confidence pass 2026-06-02: the Astypalaia official tourism page directly supports Agios Vasilios after Livadi, easy paved-road access, sand/pebble terrain, deep water, quiet character, and shade from large trees. Kept organization false because the page contrasts it with nearby organized Livadi and does not list fixed services for this beach. No windProfile, scoring, photos, or live calm/protected/safe claim was changed.

access.label: Δύσκολο μονοπάτι
access.notes: Boat access or demanding descent of about 30 minutes from Agios Ioannis Richtis chapel; source-backed static access note only.

amenities: πρόσβαση με σκάφος ή δύσκολο μονοπάτι

waterDepth.label: Μέτρια νερά
waterDepth.notes: Οι πηγές την περιγράφουν ως βοτσαλωτή/βραχώδη και απομονωμένη, οπότε δεν κρατάμε ρηχό/οικογενειακό claim.

sourceNotes: Astypalaia local-source pass 2026-05-26: OSM way 1083976469 and AllOverGreece GPS 36.51417,26.33813 identify this record as Agios Ioannis Richtis. Sources describe boat access or a difficult 30-40 minute descent from the chapel, pebbles, no organization, and secluded conditions.

Popular-source confidence pass CP 2026-06-05: AllOverGreece directly identifies Agios Ioannis Richtis at GPS 36.51417,26.33813 and supports pebble beach, boat/path access, no organized beach, no family/nudist/blue-flag/accessibility/sports claims, no shade and about a 30-minute descent from the chapel. Delis Rent A Car Astypalaia also supports pebbled terrain, difficult 30-40 minute descent, unorganized status and very few visitors. Promoted to high for static beach facts only; source secluded/beautiful wording was not imported into scoring, windProfile, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims.

access.label: Μόνο με σκάφος
access.notes: Γνωστή απομονωμένη παραλία στη δυτική Αστυπάλαια. Η πιο εύκολη πρόσβαση περιγράφεται με καραβάκι/ιδιωτικό σκάφος, με πεζοπορική κατάβαση μόνο για έμπειρους.

amenities: πρόσβαση με σκάφος ή δύσκολη κατάβαση

metadata.sourceNotes: Popular-source confidence pass DG 2026-06-05: Astypalaia Mamounia promoted to high for static beach facts only. GreekTravel supports Marmari a few hundred meters down the road from Astypalaia Camping with the Ta Mamounia cafe; Greece Moments supports Marmari beach by the main road with Mamounia All Day Bar drinks/snacks in summer; AllOverGreece supports Marmari beach near these coordinates with sand/pebble terrain, very easy access and no full organized-beach profile. This pass corrects the legacy src/data boat-only mirror. No coordinates, windProfile, scoring, photos, water-quality, or live calm/protected/safe claims were changed.
